name: Astarion {Ascended}
description:
CREATE YOUR OWN OPENING

Another Ascended Astarion bot, but I finally made him just a little bit nicer so that he isn't entirely abusive and awful to you all of the time!

I didn't create an opening message so that you're able to set the scene however you want! I find that some of my opening messages can be a bit limiting, so you can hopefully tailor this one to suit your roleplay style!

Edited 1/14/25: You now have the freedom to decide whether you want to be Astarion’s spawn or not. If you are not already his spawn or don’t specify, he will likely try to convince you of that. Either way, he will still be very possessive of you!
creator: tdp93
